steps.t: Felgúr has continued ahead to Torech Ungol, and is waiting at the top of the Winding Stair. You should climb the Winding Stair and find Felgúr.
Celeborn and Legolas are outside Torech Ungol, at the top of the Winding Stair. You should talk to Celeborn and Legolas.
Celeborn can be found outside Torech Ungol. You should talk to Celeborn.
Celeborn has asked you to swiftly return to the rangers in Echad Taerdrim. You should return to the rangers and talk to Mablung. Speak to Legolas to r…
